query:
SELECT 
  codigoCetip, rating, indexador,
  zspread,
  taxaIndicativa,
  CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(12,6)) as zspread_num
FROM spread_analysis
WHERE zspread IS NOT NULL AND rating IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY CAST(zspread AS DECIMAL(12,6)) ASC
LIMIT 10;
